issue: Cursor crashes on shutdown requiring daily reinstall
sample_quotes: Failed to install cursor update on shutdown — uninstalls itself. User must reinstall every day.
reasoning: Complete loss of application functionality requiring daily reinstallation constitutes a blocking issue with severe user impact.

issue: wait() resolved before terminal result written — broke CI pipelines
sample_quotes: Hydration stopped before run reached final state. Broke headless automation reading partial results.
reasoning: Blocking issue causing CI pipeline failures due to premature completion before results are fully written, creating data integrity risk in automated workflows.

issue: Agent dispose deleted checkpoint blobs incorrectly — silent data loss on teardown
sample_quotes: Missing root ref triggered full directory wipe even when checkpoint blobs existed.
reasoning: Silent data loss due to incorrect blob deletion during agent teardown represents critical data integrity failure requiring immediate investigation and fix.

issue: Cloud sessions failed to stream over HTTP/1.1 — broke proxies and CI images
sample_quotes: Streaming assumed HTTP/2. All HTTP/1.1 environments broken silently. Fixed in recent release.
reasoning: Complete failure of cloud sessions in HTTP/1.1 environments (proxies, CI) represents a blocking issue affecting entire infrastructure classes with no workaround.

issue: Tab completion returning [not_found] on every request — indexing stuck on loading
sample_quotes: Every request logs Error in streaming cpp [not_found]. Tab completely broken. Indexing never completes.
reasoning: Tab completion completely non-functional with indexing failure, blocking core editor feature entirely.

issue: Tab complete shows suggestion but pressing Tab does nothing — or deletes 5-20 unrelated lines
sample_quotes: Must type something first to accept suggestion. When it does accept — deletes unrelated code below cursor. Data loss risk.
reasoning: Data loss from unrelated code deletion combined with broken tab completion acceptance represents a critical blocker affecting core editor functionality.

issue: Agent deletes files on repeated edits — not intentional deletion but a write bug
sample_quotes: Since update 2.1.50 repeated edits to same file result in file deletion. Bug in Cursor file write mechanism.
reasoning: Data loss risk from unintentional file deletion due to write mechanism bug is a blocking critical issue requiring immediate investigation.

issue: Cursor reliably crashes every time Agent mode edits a file
sample_quotes: Reproducible: new folder cleared history all extensions disabled. UI freezes moment Agent edits any file. 100% repro.
reasoning: 100% reproducible crash blocking Agent mode functionality with UI freeze during file edits represents critical blocker requiring immediate engineering investigation.

issue: Context compression forgets edits from 2 minutes ago
sample_quotes: Not a model bug — compression weights by space occupied not recency. Workaround: shorter sessions.
reasoning: User reports context compression algorithm loses recent edits, which breaks the editor's ability to maintain conversation coherence and requires frequent session restarts as a workaround.

issue: Single prompt consumed 5M tokens in plan mode — API usage jumped 35% to 75%
sample_quotes: Triggered by adding MCP server. Same task on Codex used 300k tokens. Suspected bug not feature.
reasoning: Significant unintended token consumption (5M vs expected 300k) with measurable billing impact suggests a context window bug, likely related to MCP server integration, with clear workaround unavailable.

issue: .d.ts files referenced unpublished workspace packages — caused TS2305/TS2307 errors
sample_quotes: Published types had internal workspace deps. Silent 'any' on stream types.
reasoning: Published package with unresolved internal dependencies causes TypeScript compilation failures (TS2305/TS2307) for downstream consumers, a broken distribution artifact with no workaround.

issue: Python SDK list_runs returned spurious agent-not-found errors
sample_quotes: Bridge subprocess didn't inherit correct cwd. Fixed in cursor-sdk 0.1.6.
reasoning: A subprocess working directory issue caused spurious errors in the Python SDK's list_runs method, affecting agent functionality with a fix already released.

issue: Code suggestions stopped appearing after clearing settings.json
sample_quotes: Chat works fine but Tab suggestions gone. Clearing settings only fixes temporarily. Intermittent.
reasoning: Core feature (tab completion) is broken with only temporary workarounds and intermittent recurrence, indicating a persistent bug in settings persistence or suggestion pipeline.

issue: Tab completion hallucinating suggestions aggressively with no context
sample_quotes: Overly aggressive suggestions when no context available. Previously accurate for refactoring — now unreliable.
reasoning: Regression in core feature reliability causing users to distrust suggestions, making tab completion effectively broken for their workflow despite no crash.

issue: Agent/editor mode switch button broken — no way to switch back without CMD+E
sample_quotes: Button changes label but doesn't switch modes. Workaround exists (CMD+E) but UX is broken.
reasoning: Button UI element fails to trigger mode switch despite label change, broken feature with keyboard workaround but poor UX indicates implementation bug

issue: Agent/editor view selection applies to ALL open Cursor windows — not per-window
sample_quotes: Switching to agent view in one window forces all other open windows to switch too. Breaks multi-project workflows.
reasoning: Significant feature degradation that breaks multi-window workflows by applying view state globally instead of per-window, with no workaround for users managing multiple projects simultaneously.

issue: Agent edits files without accessing them in user mode — bypasses confirmation
sample_quotes: Agent auto-creates/edits files using markdown code block syntax without user confirmation. Security concern.
reasoning: Agent mode bypassing user confirmation for file modifications is a significant feature defect with security implications, though not a complete blocker if users can disable agent mode.

issue: Agent mode applies file changes directly to disk with no diff UI or Accept/Reject controls
sample_quotes: After recent update — no red/green diff shown. No Keep/Undo buttons. Changes auto-accepted. Multiple versions affected.
reasoning: Broken feature with significant workflow degradation: Agent mode applying changes without user review capability is a critical control loss, though users can manually undo file changes if needed.
